description_long: This is a modern, sculptural swivel chair with a high, rounded backrest that curves smoothly into the seat and arm areas, forming a continuous, organic shell. The chair is upholstered in a dark, glossy material, likely leather or faux leather, which gives it a sleek and luxurious appearance. Its seat is deep and contoured, providing ergonomic support and comfort, while the armrests are integrated into the flowing shape of the shell. The chair is supported by a single central metal column that branches into a four-pronged star-shaped base, finished in a matching dark tone. There are no visible casters, and the base appears stable and designed for smooth swiveling. This chair's iconic silhouette and high-quality finish make it suitable for upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, lounges, or modern offices.
description: A sleek, glossy dark swivel chair with a high, rounded back and integrated armrests, supported by a four-pronged metal base. Its sculptural, ergonomic design and luxurious finish make it ideal for modern urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep, curved seat, high rounded backrest, and integrated armrests, with the glossy finish clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the smooth, continuous shell of the backrest and the central support column with the four-pronged base.
description_view_2: Back view emphasizing the tall, rounded backrest and the seamless, sculptural form of the chair's shell.
description_view_3: Side three-quarter view displaying the pronounced curvature of the seat and back, as well as the ergonomic integration of the armrests.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, cylindrical metal column in a dark finish, branching into a four-pronged star-shaped base; appears fixed and sturdy.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rounded, and smoothly contoured backrest integrated with the seat, upholstered in glossy dark material with no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the shell, upholstered in the same material as the seat and back, with no separate attachments.
